banner.model_error: Model failed to load — check Settings.
home.activity.summary_aria: {total} chunks across {active} active days. {last7} chunks in the last 7 days. Most active day: {date}, {count} chunks.
home.activity.summary_sample_aria: Activity map is based on the {limit} most recent chunks returned by the timeline query. Sample covers {active} active days. Most active sampled day: {date}, {count} chunks.
home.activity.cell_aria_one: {date}, {count} chunk, {intensity}. Click to view in Timeline.
home.activity.cell_aria_other: {date}, {count} chunks, {intensity}. Click to view in Timeline.
home.action.reindex_title: Open Index and enable Force re-index. Indexing does not start until you run it.
home.action.export_title: Open Settings to the Export / Import section
home.action.dedup_title: Open Settings to the Deduplicate section. The scan does not start automatically.
home.state.no_sources_hint: Add files from the Index tab
home.state.no_pinned: No pinned chunks yet — click ☆ Pin in the detail panel
home.pin.missing_title: Pinned chunk is missing. Press Remove to clear it.
search.help: Semantic search across indexed memories. Filters: tag, namespace, type, score. Pipeline: BM25 (keyword) + Dense (semantic) → RRF fusion.
search.filter_toggle_title: Show/hide tag, type, sort and other filters
search.view_title: Switch between card and compact list view
search.tag_filter_title: Comma-separated tags to include in results
search.ns_filter_title: Limit search to a specific namespace
search.type_filter_title: Filter by chunk type (markdown, code, etc.)
search.topk_help: Maximum results returned. Increase for broader coverage.
search.topk_title: Maximum number of results to return
search.context_title: Include N neighboring chunks around each result for more context
search.adv_title: Source multi-select, score threshold, saved searches, export
search.adv_score_help: Minimum similarity score (0–1). Higher = more relevant but fewer results.
search.empty_hint: / focus · j/k navigate · p pin · c copy
search.detail_empty: Select a result to view details
search.detail_save_title: Save content and tag changes to this chunk
search.detail_reset_title: Discard unsaved edits and restore original
search.detail_source_title: Show all chunks from the same source file
search.detail_pin_title: Pin this chunk to prevent decay removal
sources.help: Indexed source files. Click a file to browse chunks. Drag the divider to resize. Sort by name, chunks, size, or recency.
sources.title: Sources
sources.filter_placeholder: Type to filter by path or body… e.g. .md, src/, utils
sources.filter_title: Filters source list by partial path or indexed body match
sources.empty_text: Select a source to browse its chunks
sources.language_drift_banner: ⚠️ {count} summaries don't match your language setting ({current})
index.help: Three ways to add memories to memtomem.
index.folder_oneshot_hint: One-shot scan. For automatic re-indexing, use
index.register_source_title: Add this path to memory_dirs so future changes are auto-indexed
index.add_privacy_hint: Privacy guard scans for tokens, API keys, and private keys — not email or phone numbers.
compose.privacy_warning_message: What looks like an API key was found. This content will be stored as-is in the local database and exposed to search — proceed anyway?
confirm.redaction_blocked_message: The server detected {hits} secret-like pattern(s) on {surface}. Bypass and write anyway? This will be audited.
toast.redaction_bypassed: Bypassed redaction guard ({hits} hits) — entry written.
toast.redaction_bypass_partial: Bypass partial — {succeeded} of {total} blocked file(s) written. Check per-file results below.
toast.upload_redaction_cancelled: Upload cancelled — redaction guard left {count} file(s) blocked.
settings.ctx.confirm_delete_msg: This will remove the canonical artifact from .memtomem/.
settings.ctx.confirm_cascade_codex: This will also delete files in ~/.codex/ (user-scope). Continue?
settings.ctx.confirm_sync_all: Fan out all canonical artifacts to all runtimes?
settings.ctx.import_priority: Import priority: Claude → Gemini (Codex is forward-only)
settings.ctx.conflict_msg: Someone else modified this file while you were editing. Choose how to resolve.
settings.ctx.conflict_draft_restored: Restored unsaved edits from previous session
settings.ctx.pointer_missing_target: Run Sync All to push {count} missing entries.
settings.ctx.pointer_missing_canonical: {count} runtime entries are not in canonical — open {leaf} to import.
settings.ctx.no_artifacts_hint: Create one or import from existing runtimes.
settings.ctx.empty_hint: Place {type} under {canonical}/<name>/ then click Sync, or click Import to pull existing {type} from {scan_dirs} within this project.
settings.ctx.empty_hint_user: Place {type} under {canonical}/<name>/ then click Sync. User canonical is shared across all projects.
settings.ctx.sync_empty_canonical: No canonical {type} under {canonical}. Create one first.
settings.ctx.runtime_only_banner: {count} {type} found in {scan_dirs}; none imported yet. Click Import to canonicalize.
settings.ctx.sync_disabled_tooltip: No canonical {type} to fan out yet. Click Import first.
settings.ctx.sync_all_disabled_tooltip: No canonical artifacts to fan out yet. Click Import in each section first.
settings.ctx.missing_canonical_project_s: {count} runtime {type} from {scan_dirs} are not in canonical. Click Import to initialize from the web UI, or run the CLI bootstrap and sync commands below.
settings.ctx.missing_canonical_user_body: {count} runtime {type} are not in user canonical. The web UI is read-only for user-tier canonical operations; run the CLI bootstrap and sync commands below.
settings.ctx.missing_canonical_project_l: {count} runtime {type} are not in project_local canonical. project_local is a gitignored draft tier with no runtime fan-out; initialize drafts with the CLI, and sync will report the no-fan-out skip.
settings.ctx.project_local_no_fanout_too: project_local is a draft tier with no runtime fan-out.
settings.ctx.write_blocked_user_tooltip: Web UI is read-only for user-tier canonicals — manage these via the `mm context` CLI.
settings.ctx.write_blocked_project_local: project_local is a draft tier with no runtime fan-out — switch to project_shared to publish.
settings.ctx.write_blocked_user_banner: Read-only tier — user-tier canonicals are managed via the CLI.
settings.ctx.write_blocked_project_local: Draft-only tier — project_local artifacts have no runtime fan-out (ADR-0011 §3).
settings.hooks.detail.click_hint: Click a rule to view details.
settings.ctx.overview_desc: Sync memtomem agent runtime artifacts to Claude Code, Codex, and other detected runtimes.
settings.ctx.refresh_tooltip: Refresh detected Claude Code / Codex runtime status
settings.ctx.sync_all_tooltip: Push canonical memtomem artifacts to all detected runtimes
settings.ctx.sync_all_aria: Sync all artifacts to detected runtimes
settings.ctx.skills_desc: Reusable workflows shared across Claude Code, Codex, and other detected runtimes.
settings.ctx.commands_desc: Project-scoped slash commands kept in .claude/commands/, synced to detected runtimes.
settings.ctx.agents_desc: Specialized subagents shared across Claude Code, Codex, and other detected runtimes.
settings.ctx.add_project_prompt: Absolute path to a project root (e.g. /Users/me/Edu/inflearn):
settings.ctx.confirm_remove_project: Stop tracking "{label}"? Files on disk are unaffected.
settings.ctx.scope_experimental_tip: Discovered via the opt-in ~/.claude/projects scan; the path may be misdecoded.

settings.ctx.skills_sync_tooltip: Push memtomem's canonical skills to all detected runtimes
settings.ctx.skills_sync_aria: Sync skills to all detected runtimes
settings.ctx.commands_add_project_toolti: Register a project folder so memtomem can detect its custom commands
settings.ctx.commands_add_project_aria: Add project for custom command detection
settings.ctx.commands_create_tooltip: Create a new memtomem-managed custom command
settings.ctx.commands_import_tooltip: Pull existing custom commands from a detected runtime into memtomem
settings.ctx.commands_import_aria: Import custom commands from detected runtimes
settings.ctx.commands_sync_tooltip: Push memtomem's canonical custom commands to all detected runtimes
settings.ctx.commands_sync_aria: Sync custom commands to all detected runtimes

settings.hooks.desc: Lifecycle hooks defined in .memtomem/settings.json, applied to the active runtime.
settings.hooks.title: Hooks
settings.hooks.sync_now_tooltip: Apply .memtomem/settings.json hook config to the active runtime
settings.hooks.sync_now_disabled_no_sour: No .memtomem/settings.json to sync — create it first via `mm init`.
settings.hooks.sync_now_disabled_no_hook: .memtomem/settings.json has no hook rules to sync.
settings.hooks.pending: hooks will be added on sync
settings.hooks.delete_confirm: Delete "{label}" from the selected target settings file?
settings.hooks.promote_confirm_private: Save "{label}" to .memtomem/settings.json? This can be committed and shared with teammates.
settings.hooks.promote_all_confirm: Save {count} target-only hook rule(s) to memtomem-managed settings?
settings.hooks.promote_all_confirm_priva: Save {count} target-only hook rule(s) to .memtomem/settings.json? These can be committed and shared with teammates.
settings.hooks.promote_delete_original_o: Remove original from the selected target after saving
settings.hooks.promote_delete_success: Saved to memtomem and removed the original target rule
settings.hooks.promote_delete_partial: Saved to memtomem, but the original target rule was not removed.
settings.hooks.promote_all_result: {saved} saved, {deleted} original(s) removed, {conflicts} conflict(s), {aborted} stale, {failed} failed
settings.hooks.original_already_removed: Original target rule is already gone
settings.hooks.promote_conflict: memtomem already has a different hook rule for this event and matcher.
settings.hooks.edit_unavailable_v1_hint: Direct editing is not available here yet. Edit {path} manually.
settings.hooks.rule_action_stale: Hook rule changed. Refresh and retry.
settings.hooks.no_source_hint: Create .memtomem/settings.json or run mm init to set up hooks.
settings.hooks.error_hint: Fix the JSON file and reload.
settings.hooks.no_hooks_hint: Add hook rules to .memtomem/settings.json to make them appear as pending or synced.
settings.config.desc: Server settings: embedding provider, storage backend, search and indexing parameters.
settings.config.guide_text: Select a config section to see its documentation.
settings.ns.desc: Organize memories by namespace and review chunk counts per group.
settings.ns.title: Namespaces
settings.ns.empty.title: No namespaces yet
settings.ns.empty.body: Index files with a namespace, or define one in your config rules to bucket memories.
settings.dedup.desc: Find near-duplicate chunks by similarity threshold and merge or skip them.
settings.dedup.threshold_help: Similarity above which chunks are considered duplicates. Default 0.92 catches near-identical content.
settings.dedup.empty_text: Run Scan to see duplicate candidates
settings.decay.desc: Expire chunks older than a cutoff date, optionally filtered by source path.
settings.reset.desc: Permanently delete all memory data and reinitialize the database. Embedding config is kept.
settings.reset.warning_text: This will permanently delete ALL data (chunks, sessions, history, relations, entities, etc.) and reinitialize the database. Embedding configuration is preserved.
settings.reset.confirm_message: This will permanently delete ALL data. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
settings.sessions.desc: Browse episodic session history and per-session event timelines.
settings.sessions.title: Episodic Sessions
settings.scratch.desc: Ephemeral key-value scratch pad with optional TTL, promotable to long-term memory.
settings.scratch.title: Working Memory
settings.procedures.title: Procedures
settings.health.desc: Memory health report — coverage, dead chunks, session stats. Includes watchdog run.
settings.health.title: Memory Health
settings.health.watchdog_desc: Periodic background checks. Run manually to force an update.
settings.watchdog.title: Health Watchdog
settings.export.desc: Export filtered chunks to a JSON bundle or import a bundle to re-index.
settings.export.title: Export
settings.import.title: Import
settings.import.hint: Upload a memtomem_export.json bundle to re-index its chunks.
tags.help: Tag cloud sized by frequency. Click a tag to filter search. Auto-Tag analyzes content to suggest tags for untagged chunks.
tags.title: Tags
tags.autotag_desc: Analyze chunk content and extract keyword-based tags automatically.
tags.autotag_dryrun_help: Preview suggested tags without applying. Uncheck to apply immediately.
timeline.help: Activity timeline of indexed chunks. Heatmap shows daily activity. Toggle Chunks/Files view.
timeline.empty_text: Click Load to view the timeline
shortcut.back: Back to results list from detail
picker.title: Pick a folder
picker.outside: Outside the picker scope. Close and type the path to use it.

toast.quick_action.open_index: Opened Index. Choose a source, then run indexing.

toast.quick_action.open_export: Opened Export / Import. Choose filters before previewing or downloading.
toast.quick_action.open_dedup: Opened Deduplicate. Review the threshold, then run the scan.
toast.stream_fallback: Streaming failed. Try the Index button instead.
toast.watchdog_disabled: Health watchdog is disabled. Set MEMTOMEM_HEALTH_WATCHDOG__ENABLED=true to enable.
toast.select_saved: Select a saved search to delete
toast.chunk_target_missing: Couldn't locate the linked chunk in this view.
toast.sync_partial_settings_needs_confir: Sync All complete except Settings — confirm host writes in the Settings panel.

confirm.bulk_delete_msg: {count} chunks will be permanently removed from source files and deleted from the index. This cannot be undone.
confirm.expire_msg: Permanently delete {count} expired chunk(s). This action cannot be undone.
confirm.hooks_replace_msg: Replace your "{label}" rule with memtomem's version?

settings.reset.title: Reset to default (preview; press Save to apply)
